
### execution units AKA functional units (1a)  {.smaller}



* where actual work of instruction is done
* e.g. the actual ALU, or data cache
* sometimes pipelined: 

   * (here: 1 op/cycle; 3 cycle latency)

 ![](/ooo/texfig/realCpuFU-execution-units-aka-functional-units-1.figure.svg)
 

* exercise: how long to compute $A\times (B\times (C\times D))$? 

::: {.fragment .fade-in}

$3\times 3$ cycles + any time to forward values

:::

### execution units AKA functional units (1b) {.smaller}

![](/ooo/texfig/realCpuFU-execution-units-aka-functional-units-1.figure.svg)


* exercise: how long to compute $(A\times B)\times (C\times D)$?

::: {.fragment .fade-in}

assuming just one ALU:

+------------+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
|            |1|2|3|4|5|6|7|
+============+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+
|$A\times B$ |1|2|3| | | | |
+------------+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
|$C\times D$ | |1|2|3| | | |
+------------+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
|<i>final</i>| | | | |1|2|3|
+------------+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+

* exercise part 2: how much would second ALU help?

:::

### execution units AKA functional units (2)  {.smaller}



* where actual work of instruction is done
* e.g. the actual ALU, or data cache
* sometimes unpipelined:

![](/ooo/texfig/realCpuFU-execution-units-aka-functional-units-2.figure.svg)
